title: Our People
content:
Our people are our greatest asset. In our pursuit of excellence, we attract the most talented people – those who deliver the best business and legal solutions to our clients.
- Dominique Amyot-Bilodeau Partner Montréal, Québec City +1 514-397-7097, +1 418-521-3051 damyotbilodeau@mccarthy.ca
